Timing & Pacing: Timed visual song titles during the instrumental intro. Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions in rapid vocal sections to prevent cascading delays and maintain tight synchronization with the audio.

subtitles.original: [曲：さよならメモリーズ]
subtitles.english: [Song: Sayonara Memories]

subtitles.original: [曲：ODDS&ENDS]
subtitles.english: [Song: ODDS&ENDS]

subtitles.original: いつだって君は嗤われ者だ
subtitles.english: You are always someone who is laughed at

subtitles.original: やることなすことツイてなくて
subtitles.english: Having rotten luck in all that you do,

subtitles.original: 挙句に雨に降られ
subtitles.english: Being rained on in the end

subtitles.original: お気に入りの傘は風で飛んでって
subtitles.english: Your favorite umbrella has been blown away by the wind,

subtitles.original: そこのノラはご苦労様と
subtitles.english: The stray cat there says "thanks for your hard work"

subtitles.original: 足を踏んづけてった
subtitles.english: and steps on your foot

subtitles.original: いつもどおり君は嫌われものだ
subtitles.english: Just like always you are a hated person

subtitles.original: 何にもせずとも遠ざけられて
subtitles.english: Kept at a distance without a reason

subtitles.original: 努力をしてみるけど
subtitles.english: Though you always try and make your best effort

subtitles.original: その理由なんて「なんとなく？」で
subtitles.english: With the reason being something like “Well, I’m not really sure…”

subtitles.original: 君は途方に暮れて悲しんでた
subtitles.english: You were at a loss and feeling sad

subtitles.original: ならあたしの声を使えばいいよ
subtitles.english: If that’s the case, you should use my voice!

subtitles.original: 人によっては理解不能で
subtitles.english: Though it’s not understood by some,

subtitles.original: なんて耳障り、ひどい声だって言われるけど
subtitles.english:
Even though it’s called “ear-grating”,
“an awful voice”

subtitles.original: きっと君の力になれる
subtitles.english: It will surely become your strength

subtitles.original: だからあたしを歌わせてみて
subtitles.english: So try and let me sing,

subtitles.original: そう君の、君だけの言葉でさ
subtitles.english: Yes, let me sing your very own words

subtitles.original: 綴って 連ねて
subtitles.english: Compose them and join them together

subtitles.original: あたしがその思想(コトバ)を叫ぶから
subtitles.english: Since I’ll cry out those words

subtitles.original: 描いて 理想を
subtitles.english: Describe your ideals,

subtitles.original: その思いは誰にも 触れさせない
subtitles.english: No one will be allowed to touch those feelings of yours

subtitles.original: ガラクタの声はそして響く
subtitles.english: And then the voice of rubbish (Odds & Ends) will ring out

subtitles.original: ありのままを不器用につないで
subtitles.english: Clumsily tying together things as they are

subtitles.original: 目一杯に 大声を上げる
subtitles.english: Raising a big voice with all one’s might

subtitles.original: いつからか君は人気者だ
subtitles.english: One day you became a famous person

subtitles.original: 沢山の人にもてはやされ あたしも鼻が高い
subtitles.english: Praised by so many, I was proud as well

subtitles.original: でもいつからか君は変わった
subtitles.english: Eventually something about you changed

subtitles.original: 冷たくなって だけど寂しそうだった
subtitles.english: You become cold, and yet seemingly lonely all the same

subtitles.original: 「もう機械の声なんてたくさんだ
subtitles.english: “Enough with this mechanical voice already,

subtitles.original: 僕は僕自身なんだよ」って
subtitles.english: I’ll be my own person!”

subtitles.original: ついに君は抑えきれなくなって
subtitles.english: In the end you were unable to keep yourself from

subtitles.original: あたしを嫌った
subtitles.english: hating me

subtitles.original: 君の後ろで誰かが言う
subtitles.english: Behind your back, someone said,

subtitles.original: 「虎の威を借る狐のくせに」って
subtitles.english: “Even though all this fame is not his own doing…”

subtitles.original: 君は ひとりで泣いてたんだね
subtitles.english: Hey, you were crying all alone weren’t you?

subtitles.original: 聴こえる？この声
subtitles.english: Can you hear it? This voice of mine.

subtitles.original: あたしがその言葉を掻き消すから
subtitles.english: Since I’ll drown out those hurtful words

subtitles.original: 解ってる本当は 君が誰より優しいってことを
subtitles.english: I know the truth, that you really are kinder than anyone else

subtitles.original: ガラクタの声はそして歌った 他の誰でもない君のために
subtitles.english: And then the voice of rubbish sang for no one but you alone,

subtitles.original: 軋んでく 限界を超えて
subtitles.english: Squeaking alone, crossing over boundaries

subtitles.original: 二人はどんなにたくさんの言葉を
subtitles.english: The two of us came up with lots of words

subtitles.original: 思いついたことだろう
subtitles.english: together didn’t we?

subtitles.original: だけど今は何ひとつ思いつかなくて
subtitles.english: Though we’re not able to come up with a single one right now

subtitles.original: だけどなにもかもわかった
subtitles.english: And yet everything is understood

subtitles.original: 「そうか、きっとこれは夢だ。
subtitles.english: “I see, surely this is a dream.

subtitles.original: 永遠に覚めない、君と会えた、そんな夢」
subtitles.english:
That dream where I met you,
one that I'll never wake up from."

subtitles.original: ガラクタは幸せそうな表情をしたまま
subtitles.english: With a happy expression on its face, the rubbish

subtitles.original: どれだけ呼んでももう動かない
subtitles.english: no longer moves, no matter how much you call out to it

subtitles.original: 望んだはずの結末に君は泣き叫ぶ
subtitles.english: At the conclusion you should have wanted, you cry out

subtitles.original: 嘘だろ 嘘だろって そう泣き叫ぶ
subtitles.english: “It's a lie, it's a lie,” so you cry out

subtitles.original: 「僕は無力だ。ガラクタ一つだって救えやしない」
subtitles.english:
“I'm powerless.
I can't even save a single piece of rubbish.”

subtitles.original: 想いは涙に ぽつりぽつりとその頬を濡らす
subtitles.english:
Emotions turn to tears,
wetting those cheeks drop by drop
